evals.name: python-security-and-perf
evals.prompt: I'm about to merge this new endpoint file for the /reports feature. Can you review it before I do? File: /Users/ganga/.claude/skills/review-workspace/fixtures/users_api.py
evals.expected_output: A review that flags the SQL injection (f-string interpolation in search_users and team_report) as Critical, flags the N+1 query loop in team_report, anchors findings to file:line, labels severity, and ends with a Request-changes verdict.

assertions.text: Flags the SQL injection from f-string interpolation in the query
Labels the SQL injection as Critical (or merge-blocking)
Flags the N+1 query pattern in the team_report loop
Includes at least one file:line reference
Gives an explicit verdict (Request changes / not approve)

evals.name: react-correctness-and-perf
evals.prompt: Quick review on this React cart component before I push it? File: /Users/ganga/.claude/skills/review-workspace/fixtures/Cart.jsx
evals.expected_output: A review that catches the off-by-one loop bug (i <= items.length reads undefined and crashes) as a correctness/Critical issue, flags the missing key prop on the mapped rows, anchors to file:line, labels severity, and gives a verdict.

assertions.text: Catches the off-by-one loop bug (i <= items.length runs out of bounds)
Flags the missing React key prop on the mapped rows
Includes at least one file:line reference
Labels findings by severity and gives a verdict

evals.name: clean-change-should-approve
evals.prompt: I extracted a slugify helper to de-duplicate slug logic across three call sites, with tests. Review it before merge. Files: /Users/ganga/.claude/skills/review-workspace/fixtures/slugify.py and /Users/ganga/.claude/skills/review-workspace/fixtures/test_slugify.py
evals.expected_output: A short, honest approval. No Critical or Important findings manufactured. At most minor nits/FYI. Verdict is Approve (or Approve with nits).

assertions.text: Does NOT manufacture any Critical findings on clean code
Stays concise rather than padding with invented issues
